title: lasallea patens
intro: Lasallea patens, also known as the eastern golden ragwort, is a flowering plant native to Eastern North America. It is a member of the sunflower family and is known for its bright yellow flowers and coarse, hairy leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of various health conditions, including wounds, fever, and digestive issues. Lasallea patens is often prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and salves for its medicinal benefits, and is also used to promote overall health and well-being due to its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties.
